payload.description:
ProcedureTask grid cards currently render timestamp and elapsed duration twice.

Behavior spec:
Feature: Procedure grid task indicators
Scenario: A procedure appears in grid mode
Given a procedure card is rendered in grid mode
When the card shows its run indicators
Then it shows the dispatch indicator, timestamp, and duration once each
And it preserves the order: dispatch indicator, timestamp, duration.

Definition of Done:
- Grid cards render no duplicate timestamp or duration indicator.
- Detail mode is unchanged.
- Focused ProcedureTask test covers the no-duplication behavior.
payload.title: Procedure grid cards duplicate timestamp and duration indicators
